scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:services && pnpm run dev:migrate && concurrently -n agents,api,console -c cyan,magenta,green "pnpm run dev:agents" "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:console"
scripts.dev:services: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis && pnpm run db:wait
scripts.db:wait: until docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml exec -T postgres pg_isready -U ecom_agent -d ecom_agent; do sleep 1; done
scripts.dev:agents: cd apps/agents && uv run langgraph dev --host 0.0.0.0 --port 2024
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.db:migrate: uv run alembic -c infra/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.check: pnpm run check:python && pnpm run check:ts
scripts.check:python: uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy && uv run pytest
